project.name: Paid Conversion Instrumentation Upgrade
project.notes: Make BarrelBook's existing analytics decision-grade for free-to-paid conversion work without adding a third-party analytics SDK or changing pricing/paywall UX.

required: Canonical analytics docs define the paid conversion funnel and privacy-safe props
iOS paywall emits lifecycle, interaction, and outcome events with consistent conversion context
Backend StoreKit sync emits subscription_activated for applied subscription transactions
Scan-to-save activation funnel emits coarse milestone events
Website App Store CTAs emit plan/page/location intent events through existing analytics
Focused verification passes or any baseline blockers are documented

items.title: Canonical analytics spec update
items.description: Update the analytics catalog with paid conversion funnel events, reporting sequence, and privacy-safe props. Mark paywall_accept as legacy/backward-compatible.
acceptanceCriteria: Docs define the new paid conversion funnel events and owners
Docs define canonical reporting sequence from activation through subscription activation
Docs explicitly preserve privacy rules for conversion props
paywall_accept is documented as legacy/backward-compatible rather than the primary conversion metric

items.title: Paywall lifecycle instrumentation
items.description: Instrument PlansPaywallView so views, selection, cycle changes, dismiss, restore, redeem, purchase starts, cancellations, failures, and successes are logged with consistent conversion context.
acceptanceCriteria: Plans paywall logs enriched paywall_view_shown and plans_impression context
Plan selection and billing cycle changes emit dedicated events
Restore, redeem, and dismiss actions emit dedicated events
Purchase start/cancel/fail/success events include selected plan, cycle, product ID, intro offer eligibility, current tier, bottle count, and library cap where available
Existing purchase behavior and entitlement unlock behavior are unchanged

items.title: Backend subscription activation event
items.description: Emit subscription_activated from StoreKit transaction sync when a subscription transaction is applied to a user plan.
acceptanceCriteria: Applied subscription transactions log subscription_activated with plan, cycle, product ID, environment, and source
Analytics write is best effort and does not change endpoint status codes or entitlement behavior
Existing paywall_accept backend compatibility event remains available

items.title: Activation funnel instrumentation
items.description: Instrument scan-to-save milestones with coarse plan/cap/count context for conversion analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: scan_started, scan_completed, scan_failed, and extraction_review_shown are logged from scan flows
bottle_saved includes source plus plan tier, bottle count, and library cap where available
slot_warning_shown and slot_limit_hit are logged from cap-related scan eligibility paths
No bottle names, IDs, usernames, or raw label text are logged

items.title: Website attribution companion task
items.description: Track App Store CTA intent on the website through existing GA/Vercel analytics hooks so page, plan, and CTA location can be reconciled with app-side conversion reporting.
acceptanceCriteria: Website App Store badge and plan CTAs emit app_store_cta_clicked events
Events include page, CTA location, and plan intent where available
Tracking uses existing GA/Vercel setup and does not add a third-party analytics SDK
